stages.concept:
# Unit 073: 동명사의 역할 (주어, 보어, 목적어) - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **동명사의 역할**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> **Swimming** is good exercise.
> 수영하는 것은 좋은 운동이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 동명사는 **동사원형 + -ing** 형태로, 문장에서 명사 역할을 해요. 주어, 보어, 목적어 자리에 올 수 있어요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **주어** 자리 — ~하는 것은

> **Reading** books is my hobby.
> 책을 읽는 것은 나의 취미이다.

> **Playing** soccer is fun.
> 축구를 하는 것은 재미있다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **보어** 자리 — ~하는 것이다

> My hobby is **collecting** stamps.
> 나의 취미는 우표를 모으는 것이다.

> His dream is **becoming** a pilot.
> 그의 꿈은 조종사가 되는 것이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **목적어** 자리 — ~하는 것을

> I enjoy **reading** books.
> 나는 책 읽는 것을 즐긴다.

> She finished **doing** her homework.
> 그녀는 숙제하는 것을 끝냈다.

> He avoids **eating** fast food.
> 그는 패스트푸드 먹는 것을 피한다.

**Q. 다음 문장의 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 단어를 고르세요.**
"She finished (       ) her homework."
1. doing ✅
2. to do
3. do

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요! enjoy, finish, avoid 같은 동사는 목적어로 반드시 동명사(-ing)를 써야 해요. 

👩‍🏫 선생님: 동명사를 목적어로 취하는 동사: **enjoy, finish, avoid, mind, give up, keep, practice** 등

🧑‍🎓 학생: 동명사(동사-ing)는 주어, 보어, 목적어로 쓰이고, enjoy/finish/avoid 같은 동사 뒤에는 동명사가 오는 거군요!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 073: 동명사의 역할 주어, 보어, 목적어 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 밑줄 친 부분이 해당하는 것을 고르시오.
Eating fruit is good for your health.
> **정답** 주어

---

**02.** My hobby is reading books.
> **정답** 보어

---

**03.** She enjoys playing the piano.
> **정답** 목적어

---

**04.** Swimming in the pool is fun.
> **정답** 주어

---

**05.** He finished doing his homework.
> **정답** 목적어

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Play soccer is fun.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Play → Playing

---

**07.** My hobby is cook Italian food.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** cook → cooking

---

**08.** She enjoys swim in the ocean.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** swim → swimming

---

**09.** Run every morning is healthy.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Run → Running

---

**10.** He finished write his essay.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** write → writing

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
영어를 공부하는 것은 중요하다.
English is important.
> **정답** Studying

---

**12.** 나의 취미는 사진 찍기이다.
My hobby is pictures.
> **정답** taking

---

**13.** 그녀는 노래 부르는 것을 좋아한다.
She enjoys .
> **정답** singing

---

**14.** 매일 운동하는 것은 건강에 좋다.
every day is good for health.
> **정답** Exercising

---

**15.** 그는 책 읽는 것을 끝냈다.
He finished the book.
> **정답** reading

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
아침에 걷는 것은 좋다.
Walking in is the morning good
> **정답** Walking / in / the / morning / is / good

---

**17.** 나의 꿈은 세계 여행하기이다.
My dream is around traveling the world
> **정답** My / dream / is / traveling / around / the / world

---

**18.** 그는 게임하는 것을 즐긴다.
enjoys He playing games
> **정답** He / enjoys / playing / games

---

**19.** 일찍 일어나는 것은 쉽지 않다.
Getting early up is not easy
> **정답** Getting / up / early / is / not / easy

---

**20.** 그녀는 그림 그리기를 끝냈다.
finished She the picture drawing
> **정답** She / finished / drawing / the / picture
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 073: 동명사의 역할 주어, 보어, 목적어 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
The baby began ________________.
So, her mother stopped ______________ coffee and
rushed to the boy.
crying - drinking
crying - to drink
to cry - to drink
cry - drink
> **정답** crying - drinking

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
_________________ English may be everyone's wish.
If they don't give up _______________ it, they will be
good at it.
To master - to study
Mater - studying
Mastering - to study
Mastering - studying
> **정답** Mastering - studying

---

**03.** 다음 보기의 밑줄친 부분과 같은 쓰임으로 쓰인 동명사를
고르시오.
<보기> Amy avoids staying with him in the same
place.
Tom's hobby is planting flowers on his
backyard.
The topic of my essay is making a new friend.
He enjoys taking a bath in the evening.
Swimming in the deep sea without a proper
gear may be dangerous.
> **정답** He enjoys taking a bath in the evening.

---

**04.** 다음 보기의 밑줄친 부분과 같은 쓰임으로 쓰인 동명사를
고르시오.
<보기> His job is serving food at a restaurant.
My favorite thing is watching TV on a sofa.
They practice playing the cello after school.
I enjoy celebrating Christmas.
Getting lost in unfamiliar places is scary.
> **정답** My favorite thing is watching TV on a sofa.

---

**05.** 다음 보기의 밑줄친 부분과 같은 쓰임으로 쓰인 동명사를
고르시오.
<보기> Putting on a jacket was a nice choice for the
weather.
Introducing myself to new people can be
exciting.
After I ate my lunch, I began feeding my dog.
Tom's plan was going on a picnic on the
weekend.
The writer started writing the climax part.
> **정답** Introducing myself to new people can be exciting.

---

**06.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
They began fighting over a small and
unimportant thing.
I really enjoy taking her lecture every Sunday.
Mom gave up drinking too much coffee every
morning.
Tom wants having a bath late in the evening.
> **정답** Tom wants having a bath late in the evening.

---

**07.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Tom hopes collecting some famous pictures.
The clerk kept apologizing to the customer.
Amy avoids watching TV for a long time.
I have finished reading the novel about a little
princess.
> **정답** Tom hopes collecting some famous pictures.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
같은 영화를 또 보는 것은 지루하다.
To watch the same movies again are boring.
Watch the same movies again is boring.
Watching the same movies again is boring.
To watching the same movies again is boring.
> **정답** Watching the same movies again is boring.

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 역사책 읽는 것을 싫어한다.
Amy dislikes to reading history books.
Amy dislikes read history books.
Amy dislikes reading history books.
Amy dislikes to read history books.
> **정답** Amy dislikes reading history books.

---

**10.** 다음 중 문장에 쓰인 동명사의 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
Waiting for a bus is always boring.
Tom's dream is becoming the best
basketball player.
Our goal is winning the game.
Her duty is giving her boss a wake-up call.
> **정답** Waiting for a bus is always boring.

---

**11.** 다음 중 문장에 쓰인 동명사의 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
She admitted making a wrong choice.
Amy's hobby is making origami.
A man stopped chewing his tough steak.
Would you mind closing the window?
• origami 종이접기
> **정답** Amy's hobby is making origami.

---

**12.** 다음 중 문장에 쓰인 동명사의 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
What she wants to do is taking a break from
the work.
Her hobby is taking pictures.
His job is delivering restaurant meals.
I don't mind talking with a total stranger.
> **정답** I don't mind talking with a total stranger.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Traveling new places are very exciting.
Her mission was tidy up her bedroom.
Going out to meet friends is exciting.
The lecturer enjoyed to talk about the current
issue.
> **정답** Going out to meet friends is exciting.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Arriving late to the meeting causes a problem.
Doing puzzles are my hobby.
Baking cookies are my favorite thing.
Living with two dogs make me happy.
> **정답** Arriving late to the meeting causes a problem.

---

**15.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The taxi driver kept drive
south in silence.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** drive → driving

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Amy finished to study at
midnight.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to study → studying

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Talking with friends are fun.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** are → is

---

**18.** 다음 밑줄 친 것 중 보어 역할을 하는 동명사를 모두
고르시오. [2개]
Amy's job is (1)reporting news on TV. She doesn't
like (2)delivering bad news to the citizens. Once she
wanted to give up (3)working as a reporter, but she
now enjoys (4)telling people about the world. Her
mission is (5)delivering the news accurately to
people.
> **정답** 1, 5

---

**19.** 다음 밑줄 친 것 중 주어 역할을 하는 동명사를 모두
고르시오. [2개]
Tom started (1)calling her early in the morning. But
(2)reaching her was impossible. He started
(3)worrying about her. He stopped (4)doing what he
was doing and ran to her house. He knocked on the
door and she opened it. (5)Seeing her was a great
relief.
> **정답** 2, 5

---

**20.** 다음 밑줄 친 것 중 목적어 역할을 하는 동명사를 모두
고르시오. [2개]
(1)Receiving gifts from somebody always makes me
smile. (2)Giving presents to somebody also makes me
happy. So, I enjoy (3)exchanging gifts with my friends.
But (4)wrapping gifts is difficult for me. Thankfully,
my friends don't mind (5)getting gifts with no gift
wrapper.
> **정답** 3, 5
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 073 동명사의 역할 주어, 보어, 목적어중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
주말에 늦게 일어나는 것은 나의 엄마를 화나게 한다.
[wake up, make]
  (     )  late on weekends  (     )  my mom
angry.
정답 Waking, up, makes

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
Tom은 내 질문에 답하는 것을 피했다. [avoid, answer]
Tom  (     )   (     )  to my question.
정답 avoided, answering

---

**03.** 우리 말에 맞도록 괄호 안의 말을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
Anderson은 일기 쓰는 것을 끝냈다. [finish, write]
Anderson  (     )   (     )  his diary.
정답 finished, writing

---

**04.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
[bake cookies]
A: What does Gabriel enjoy doing in his free time?
B: He enjoys  (     )   (     )  in his free time.
정답 baking, cookies

---

**05.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
[go to the beach]
A: Do you have any plans for this weekend?
B: Paul and I talked about  (     )   (     )  
.
• admit 인정하다
정답 going, to, the, beach

---

**06.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
[close the window]
A: Would you mind  (     )   (     )   (     ) (     )
B: Not at all. I'd be glad to.
정답 closing, the, window

---

**07.** 주어진 동사를 활용하여 다음 글을 완성하시오.
Today, I had a fight with my close friend. She
made a huge mistake but she didn't admit
[make]  the mistake. Now, we stopped [talk]
to each other. I want [apologize] (     ) , but for
now I avoid [meet]  her in school.
• apologize 사과하다
정답 making, talking, to apologize, meeting

---

**08.** 주어진 동사를 활용하여 다음 글을 완성하시오.
Amy's dream is [become]  a dancer. She
practices [dance]  every day after school. She
also enjoys [sing] . But, her parents don't want
her to be a dancer. So, she doesn't want
[talk] (     )  about her dream with her
parents.]
정답 becoming (to become), dancing, singing, to talk

---

**09.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
[Eat]  [breakfast]  [is]  [good]  [for]  [your]
[health.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 Eat → Eating (To eat)

---

**10.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
[One]  [of]  [my]  [hobbies]  [is]  [play]
[chess.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 play → playing (to play)

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 073: 동명사의 역할 주어, 보어, 목적어 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The baby began ________________.
So, her mother stopped ______________ tea and rushed to the girl.
crying - drinking crying - to drink to cry - to drink cry - drink
> 정답: crying - drinking

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
_________________ Korean may be everyone's wish.
If they don't give up _______________ it, they will be good at it.
To master - to study Mater - studying Mastering - to study Mastering - studying
> 정답: Mastering - studying

---

**03.** 다음 보기의 밑줄친 부분과 같은 쓰임으로 쓰인 동명사를 고르시오.
<보기> Tom avoids staying with him in the same room.
Amy's hobby is planting flowers in her garden.
The topic of my essay is making a new friend.
He enjoys taking a walk in the evening.
Swimming in the deep lake without proper gear may be dangerous.
> 정답: He enjoys taking a walk in the evening.

---

**04.** 다음 보기의 밑줄친 부분과 같은 쓰임으로 쓰인 동명사를 고르시오.
<보기> His job is serving food at a cafeteria.
My favorite thing is watching movies on a sofa.
They practice playing the drums after school.
I enjoy celebrating birthdays.
Getting lost in unfamiliar cities is scary.
> 정답: My favorite thing is watching movies on a sofa.

---

**05.** 다음 보기의 밑줄친 부분과 같은 쓰임으로 쓰인 동명사를 고르시오.
<보기> Putting on a coat was a nice choice for the weather.
Introducing myself to new classmates can be exciting.
After I ate my lunch, I began feeding my cat.
Tom's plan was going on a trip on the weekend.
The artist started drawing the main scene.
> 정답: Introducing myself to new classmates can be exciting.

---

**06.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
They began arguing over a small and unimportant thing.
I really enjoy taking her class every Monday.
Mom gave up drinking too much tea every morning.
Tom wants having a shower late in the evening.
> 정답: Tom wants having a shower late in the evening.

---

**07.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Tom hopes collecting some famous stamps.
The driver kept apologizing to the passenger.
Amy avoids watching TV for a long time.
I have finished reading the novel about a young hero.
> 정답: Tom hopes collecting some famous stamps.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
같은 노래를 또 듣는 것은 지루하다.
To listen the same songs again are boring.
Listen the same songs again is boring.
Listening to the same songs again is boring.
To listening the same songs again is boring.
> 정답: Listening to the same songs again is boring.

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
민수는 과학 잡지 읽는 것을 싫어한다.
Minsu dislikes to reading science magazines.
Minsu dislikes read science magazines.
Minsu dislikes reading science magazines.
Minsu dislikes to read science magazines.
> 정답: Minsu dislikes reading science magazines.

---

**10.** 다음 중 문장에 쓰인 동명사의 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
Waiting for a train is always boring.
Tom's dream is becoming the best soccer player.
Our goal is winning the match.
Her duty is giving her teacher a morning report.
> 정답: Waiting for a train is always boring.

---

**11.** 다음 중 문장에 쓰인 동명사의 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
She admitted making a wrong decision.
Amy's hobby is making origami.
A boy stopped chewing his tough candy.
Would you mind closing the door?
> 정답: Amy's hobby is making origami.

---

**12.** 다음 중 문장에 쓰인 동명사의 쓰임이 다른 것을 고르시오.
What she wants to do is taking a break from studying.
Her hobby is taking photos.
His job is delivering packages.
I don't mind talking with a new classmate.
> 정답: I don't mind talking with a new classmate.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Traveling to new cities are very exciting.
Her mission was tidy up her desk.
Going out to meet friends is exciting.
The speaker enjoyed to talk about the new topic.
> 정답: Going out to meet friends is exciting.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Arriving late to class causes a problem.
Doing puzzles are my hobby.
Baking bread are my favorite thing.
Living with two cats make  me happy.
> 정답: Arriving late to class causes a problem.

---

**15.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. The  bus  driver  kept  drive north  in  silence. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
